title: Roof Repairs
shortDescription: Targeted repairs for leaks, slipped tiles, damaged verges, ridge tiles and localised weather damage.
overview: Genesis Roofing carries out focused roof repairs that start with diagnosis. We look for the cause of water ingress or movement, then recommend a repair that restores weather protection without pushing unnecessary replacement work.
benefits: Leak tracing and clear repair scopes
Tile, ridge, verge and flashing repairs
features: Dry verge and mortar verge repairs

faq.question: Can you repair a small leak without replacing the roof?
faq.answer: Often, yes. We inspect the area first and will recommend a targeted repair where the rest of the roof is serviceable.

faq.question: Do you provide temporary repairs?
faq.answer: Where safe and practical, temporary weatherproofing can help reduce damage until a permanent repair is scheduled.

title: New Roofs
shortDescription: Complete roof replacement and re-roofing works using suitable coverings, battens, membranes and details.
overview: A new roof is planned as a complete system, not just a visible covering. Genesis Roofing considers structure, ventilation, underlay, battens, fixings, flashings, drainage and finishing details so the result is durable and tidy.
benefits: Tile, slate and sheet roofing advice
Clear sequencing for scaffold, materials and waste
process: Arrange safe access and strip works

faq.question: How long does a new roof take?
faq.answer: Many domestic re-roofs take one to three weeks on site, depending on roof size, access, weather, chimney work and roofline details.

faq.question: Can you replace gutters at the same time?
faq.answer: Yes. Fascias, soffits and guttering are often best reviewed while access is already in place.

title: Flat Roofing
shortDescription: Flat roof repairs and replacements for extensions, garages, porches and commercial roof areas.
overview: Flat roofs depend on correct falls, edges, outlets and detailing. Genesis Roofing installs and repairs practical flat roofing systems for domestic and light commercial properties, with attention to ponding, trims and junctions.
benefits: Felt and GRP-style flat roof options
Falls, outlets and edge trims checked
Repair or replacement advice based on condition

faq.question: Why is my flat roof holding water?
faq.answer: Ponding can be caused by poor falls, blocked outlets or deck movement. We check the drainage route before recommending work.

faq.question: Can flat roofing be repaired?
faq.answer: Some local defects can be repaired. Widespread cracking, a rotten roof deck or repeated leaks may point toward replacement.

title: Pitched Roofing
shortDescription: Pitched roof repairs, replacements and detail upgrades for tiled, slate and mixed roof coverings.
overview: Genesis Roofing works on pitched roofs where weather protection depends on the right covering, pitch, lap, underlay, ridge, verge, valley and flashing details. The service can be scoped as repair, overhaul or replacement.
benefits: Ridges, verges, valleys and flashings reviewed

faq.question: What causes pitched roof leaks?
faq.answer: Common causes include slipped tiles, failed flashings, cracked mortar, damaged valleys, blocked gutters or aged underlay.

faq.question: Can you match existing tiles?
faq.answer: We aim to match or closely blend replacements, but exact matches depend on tile age, profile and current availability.

title: Slate Roofing
shortDescription: Slate roof repairs and replacement advice for properties needing a crisp, durable roof finish.
overview: Slate roofing requires careful lap, fixing, sorting and detail work. Genesis Roofing can inspect slate defects, replace damaged slates and scope renewal where the roof covering or fixings have reached the end of their useful life.
benefits: Ridge, valley and lead detail review
Repair or renewal advice based on roof condition
process: Check details and clear roof area

faq.question: Can individual slates be replaced?
faq.answer: Yes, individual damaged or slipped slates can often be replaced when the surrounding roof is sound.

faq.question: Can a slate roof be repaired instead of replaced?
faq.answer: Often, yes. If the surrounding roof is sound, individual slipped or broken slates can usually be replaced or refixed.

title: Tile Roofing
shortDescription: Tile roof repairs, replacement tiles, ridge work and full tiled roof renewal.
overview: Tile roofs need compatible profiles, secure fixings and well-detailed ridges, verges and valleys. Genesis Roofing repairs and renews tiled roofs with attention to both appearance and long-term weather resistance.
benefits: Concrete and clay tile repair options
features: Dry ridge and dry verge options

faq.question: Can cracked roof tiles cause leaks?
faq.answer: Yes. One cracked or displaced tile can allow wind-driven rain into the roof, especially around junctions and exposed slopes.

faq.question: Do roof tiles need maintenance?
faq.answer: Periodic inspections help catch slipped tiles, failing mortar, blocked gutters and moss-related drainage issues early.

title: Leadwork
shortDescription: Lead flashing, soakers and weathering details for chimneys, walls, valleys and roof junctions.
overview: Leadwork protects some of the most vulnerable parts of a roof. Genesis Roofing can inspect failed flashings, splits, poor chasing and weathered junctions, then recommend repairs or replacement details that suit the property.
benefits: Practical detailing to suit the property

faq.question: How do I know if lead flashing has failed?
faq.answer: Signs can include damp around chimneys or walls, visible splits, lifted sections, poor mortar chases or staining below a junction.

faq.question: Can leadwork be patched?
faq.answer: Small defects may be repairable, but badly split, poorly fitted or aged flashings often need replacement.

title: Chimney Repairs
shortDescription: Chimney pointing, flashing checks, weathering details and repair work around vulnerable stacks.
overview: Chimneys are exposed to wind, rain and frost from every side. Genesis Roofing inspects stacks, flaunching, pots, leadwork and surrounding roof coverings before recommending a repair scope.
benefits: Repair scopes based on visible condition
process: Identify mortar, lead or covering issues

faq.question: Can a chimney cause a roof leak?
faq.answer: Yes. Failed flashing, cracked flaunching, porous brickwork and damaged pointing are common causes of leaks around stacks.

faq.question: Do unused chimneys still need maintenance?
faq.answer: Yes. Even unused stacks remain exposed and can let water into the property if the details fail.

title: Fascias, Soffits & Guttering
shortDescription: Roofline replacement and rainwater goods to protect rafters, walls and foundations from water damage.
overview: The roofline controls how rainwater leaves the roof. Genesis Roofing repairs and replaces fascias, soffits, gutters and downpipes, checking falls, outlet positions and vulnerable timber behind old fittings.

faq.question: Why are my gutters overflowing?
faq.answer: Common causes include blockages, poor falls, undersized outlets, damaged joints or gutters pulling away from the fascia.

faq.question: Can fascias be replaced with the roof?
faq.answer: Yes. Roofline work is often efficient when scaffolding or roof access is already planned.

title: Guttering
shortDescription: Gutter repairs, replacements and downpipe improvements for reliable rainwater management.
overview: Good guttering prevents staining, damp, overflowing water and damage to walls or foundations. Genesis Roofing checks flow routes, joints, outlets and downpipes before repairing or replacing rainwater goods.
process: Identify fall, joint or outlet issues

faq.question: Can a leaking gutter cause damp?
faq.answer: Yes. Overflowing or leaking gutters can saturate walls, fascia boards and ground around the property.

faq.question: Do you clean gutters?
faq.answer: We focus on gutter repairs, replacements and drainage improvements. If cleaning is needed before repair work, we can advise during the inspection.

title: Storm Damage Repairs
shortDescription: Rapid assessment and practical repairs after wind, heavy rain, fallen branches or sudden roof failure.
overview: Storm damage needs a calm, safe response. Genesis Roofing assesses visible roof damage, recommends temporary protection where needed and plans permanent repairs for tiles, ridges, verges, gutters and roof junctions.

faq.question: What should I do after storm damage?
faq.answer: Stay off the roof, move valuables away from leaks, take safe internal photos and contact a roofing contractor for assessment.

faq.question: Can you help with insurance evidence?
faq.answer: We can provide clear photos and scope notes from the roofing side, though claim decisions sit with the insurer.

title: Roof Inspections
shortDescription: Roof condition checks before repairs, property purchases, seasonal maintenance or suspected leaks.
overview: A roof inspection helps separate urgent defects from routine maintenance. Genesis Roofing checks coverings, ridges, verges, valleys, flashings, chimneys, flat roof areas and roofline drainage before recommending next steps.
benefits: Photos where access and safety allow
Editable survey content for future configuration

faq.question: When should a roof be inspected?
faq.answer: After storms, before buying a property, when a leak appears, or when an older roof has not been checked for several years.

faq.question: Will an inspection include photos?
faq.answer: Where access and safety allow, photo evidence can be included to make findings easier to understand.
